message:
fix(fp-expr): escape sequences in string literals + malformed float detection

- Add backslash escape support in tokenizer (\n, \t, \r, \\, \', \")
- Detect multiple decimal points during tokenization (1.2.3 → error)
- Add 6 tests covering escape sequences and decimal validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
